violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cream cheese and milk) in the reach in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Person in charge moved foods to proper location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Turkey was observed thawing on the counter. Food was moved to the refrigerator to properly thaw. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of black and pink residue. The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine must be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent the contamination of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as leafy greens) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
The gasket of the lowboy under the toaster was observed to be in poor repair (frayed). Equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the basement cooler has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The following was observed improperly stored: 1) bowl used as scoop in Reese's 2) Ice scoop stored on unclean surface (shelving) 3) Utensils stored in stagnant water Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
The gasket of the lowboy under the toaster was observed to be in poor repair (frayed). Equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
